mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, r.upload_time, l.created_at)), 0) AS avgAuditDurationSec, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r2 WHERE r2.is_deleted = 0 AND r2.audit_status = 0 AND r2.upload_time < #{overtime24hBound}) AS overtime24hCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r3 WHERE r3.is_deleted = 0 AND r3.audit_status = 0 AND r3.upload_time < #{overtime48hBound}) AS overtime48hCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r4 WHERE r4.is_deleted = 0 AND r4.audit_status = 0 AND r4.upload_time < #{overtime72hBound}) AS overtime72hCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r5 WHERE r5.is_deleted = 0 AND r5.audit_status = 0) AS totalPendingCount, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resource_audit_log log WHERE DATE(log.created_at) = CURDATE() AND log.action IN ('approve', 'approve_publish', 'approve_audit')), 0) AS todayCompletedCount, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resource_audit_log log WHERE DATE(log.created_at) = CURDATE() AND log.action = 'reject'), 0) AS todayRejectedCount FROM resource_audit_log l INNER JOIN xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r ON r.id = l.resource_id WHERE l.created_at >= #{since} AND l.action IN ('approve', 'approve_publish', 'approve_audit', 'reject')

SELECT l.auditor_id AS auditorId, l.auditor_name AS auditorName, SUM(CASE WHEN l.action IN ('approve', 'approve_publish', 'approve_audit') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approveCount, SUM(CASE WHEN l.action = 'reject' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejectCount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, CAST(COALESCE(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, r.upload_time, l.created_at)), 0) AS UNSIGNED) AS avgDurationSec, CAST(COALESCE(MAX(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, r.upload_time, l.created_at)), 0) AS UNSIGNED) AS maxDurationSec FROM resource_audit_log l INNER JOIN xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r ON r.id = l.resource_id WHERE l.created_at >= #{since} AND l.action IN ('approve', 'approve_publish', 'approve_audit', 'reject') GROUP BY l.auditor_id, l.auditor_name ORDER BY totalCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COALESCE(arr.category, 0) AS category, CASE WHEN arr.category = 0 THEN '通用' WHEN arr.category = 1 THEN '内容质量' WHEN arr.category = 2 THEN '格式规范' WHEN arr.category = 3 THEN '版权合规' WHEN arr.category = 4 THEN '分类挂载' WHEN arr.category = 5 THEN '其他' ELSE '通用' END AS categoryName, COALESCE(arr.content, l.reason) AS reason, COUNT(*) AS rejectCount FROM resource_audit_log l LEFT JOIN xinketang.audit_reject_reason arr ON arr.content = l.reason WHERE l.action = 'reject' AND l.created_at >= #{since} GROUP BY COALESCE(arr.category, 0), COALESCE(arr.content, l.reason), COALESCE(arr.category, 0) ORDER BY rejectCount DESC

SELECT stat_date AS statDate, new_count AS newCount, approved_count AS approvedCount, rejected_count AS rejectedCount, offline_count AS offlineCount, download_count AS downloadCount, view_count AS viewCount FROM xinketang.resource_daily_stats WHERE stat_date >= #{since} AND source_type = #{sourceType} ORDER BY stat_date ASC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN l.action IN ('approve', 'approve_publish', 'approve_audit') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalApproved, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN l.action = 'reject' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalRejected FROM resource_audit_log l WHERE l.created_at >= #{since}
